2300.full_name: al-Muti' bin al-Aswad b. al-Muttalib  b. Asad b. 'Abdul 'Uzza b. Qusayy b. Kilab b. Murrah b. Ka'b
2300.bio: There is some confusion whether this person and a person from B. 'Adi, who has same name (al-Muti' b. al-Aswad) are same person or two different individuals.

2301.full_name: Habbar bin al-Aswad b. al-Muttalib  b. Asad b. 'Abdul 'Uzza b. Qusayy b. Kilab b. Murrah b. Ka'b

2302.arabic: عبد الله بن مطيع بن الأسود بن المطلب
2302.bio: There is some confusion whether this person and a person from B. 'Adi, who has same name ('Abdullah bin al-Muti' b. al-Aswad) are same person or two different individuals.

2303.arabic: عبد الرحمن بن مطيع بن الأسود بن المطلب
2303.bio: There is some confusion whether this person and a person from B. 'Adi, who has same name ('Abdur Rahman bin al-Muti' b. al-Aswad) are same person or two different individuals.

2306.arabic: وهب بن زمعة بن الأسود بن المطلب

2307.arabic: عبد الله الأكبر بن وهب بن زمعة

2310.full_name: 'Abdur Rahman bin al-'Awwam bin Khuwaylid bin Asad bin 'Abdul-'Uzza bin Quasyy bin Kilab b. Murrah
2310.arabic: عبد الرحمن بن العوام بن خويلد الأسدي
2310.mother_name: Umm al-Khayr bint Malik of B.'Abd al-Dar
2310.bio: Old Name: 'Abdul Ka'ba. According to others, he died later during the Khilafat of 'Umar(ra).

2311.full_name: 'Ubaidullah bin al-'Awwam bin Khuwaylid bin Asad bin 'Abdul-'Uzza bin Quasyy bin Kilab b. Murrah

2312.full_name: Bujayr bin al-'Awwam bin Khuwaylid bin Asad bin 'Abdul-'Uzza bin Quasyy bin Kilab b. Murrah
2312.bio: According to some, he was killed in al-Jahiliyya. (Allah knows the best)

2313.full_name: 'Abdullah bin 'Abdur Rahman b. al-'Awwam b. Khuwaylid bin Asad bin 'Abdul-'Uzza bin Quasyy bin Kilab

2314.arabic: جميلة بنت عبد العزي بن قطن الخزاعية
